zh.Stockland Bristol, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特斯托可藍德 布里斯托
zh.lifeSummary: William Pruitt是John Preut和Alice的兒子，於1485年出生在英國薩默塞特斯托可藍德 布里斯托。他和Agnes至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1555年8月在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特斯托可藍德 布里斯托。

zh-hans.Stockland Bristol, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特斯托可藍德 布里斯托
zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Pruitt是John Preut和Alice的儿子，于1485年出生在英国薩默塞特斯托可藍德 布里斯托。他和Agnes至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1555年8月在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特斯托可藍德 布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Pruitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lanarkshire, Scotland): variant of   Prewitt  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Prewitt
meanings: English (Warwickshire): diminutive of   Prew  ,   Prue   or   Prow  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: William Pruitt was born in 1485, in Stockland Bristol, Somerset, England as the son of John Preut and Alice. He had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Agnes. He died in August 1555, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Stockland Bristol, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William Pruitt est né en 1485, à Stockland Bristol, Somerset, Angleterre, fils de John Preut et Alice. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Agnes. Il est décédé en août 1555, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Stockland Bristol, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: William Pruitt wurde 1485 in Stockland Bristol, Somerset, England, als Sohn von John Preut und Alice geboren. Er hatte mit Agnes mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im August 1555 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Stockland Bristol, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Pruitt è nato il nel 1485 nel Stockland Bristol, Somerset, England come figlio di John Preut e Alice. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Agnes. Morì nel agosto 1555, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Stockland Bristol, Somerset, England.

ja.Stockland Bristol, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトストックランド ブリストル
ja.lifeSummary: William Pruittは1485年にイギリスソメルセトストックランド ブリストルでJohn PreutとAliceの息子として生まれた。彼はAgnesとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1555年8月に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトストックランド ブリストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pruitt(은)는 1485년 영국 서머세트 스톡랜드 브리스톨에서 John Preut(와)과 Alice의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Agnes(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 8월 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 스톡랜드 브리스톨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Pruitt nasceu em 1485, em Stockland Bristol, Somerset, Inglaterra filho de John Preut e Alice. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Agnes. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1555, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Stockland Bristol, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: William Pruitt родился в 1485 г. в местности стоккланд бристол, сомирсет, Англия. Его родителей звали John Preut и Alice. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Agnes. Он умер август 1555 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности стоккланд бристол, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: William Pruitt nació en 1485, en Stockland Bristol, Somerset, Inglaterra como hijo de John Preut y Alice. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Agnes. Murió en agosto de 1555, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Stockland Bristol, Somerset, Inglaterra.
